review_title: A very capable file transfer client
description: My overall experience is very positive so far. I use Cyberduck very often for transferring files to my server and also my cloud storage providers. It's a fast and easy to use tool.
author: Vasilis K.
pros: First of all I like that it's open source and free to use. Also, in addition to ftp and sftp Cyberduck offers excellent integration with popular cloud storage providers.
cons: I wish there was an option to sync files between different servers.

review_title: The cloud storage one click away
description: Fast, functional and easy to deploy. Been hosting files for years now and it just works out of the box
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: How easy to setup it is, espcially using AWS, sharing files and hosting public urls works like a charm
cons: The ui lacks some style, the files upload queues can also be s bit confusing

review_title: A Pretty Standard but Functional FTP Program
description: I use it when the need arises and will continue to. Good little piece of software.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The price. The fact that there is a free version allows me to recommend this to clients who don't have a huge need for FTP enough to warrant paying for the software. I would also say that the features are pretty good and it does what you need it to do.
cons: Sometimes I find the interface a little clunky; it's not as easy to use as Transmit, which is the one I use on an everyday basis. But Transmit is not free, so I can't fully complain about Cyberduck not being as comfortable to use.

review_title: One of the absolute best FTP programs
description: Very good experience overall. Loads super quickly when opening the program. Remembers all my most important FTP login informations. Fast upload and downloads.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the ease of downloading the program and getting it up and running. Generally only takes a few minutes to get up and running. I also like how Cyberduck remembers all my server informations and makes it easy to find what I need.
cons: The only flaw I have really found is a difficulty in gaining access to the WordPress file called htaccess file. I have had difficulty getting that file to show up on some servers. Sometimes I cannot get it to be found on the server within the program.

review_title: Reliable and powerful SFTP client
description: For me, it is an irreplaceable dev-ops tool. Helps me to configure and administer remote servers, upload files, and review logs.
author: Aivar K.
pros: Remote editing - it is the best at editing the config files and reviewing logs on a server. Sublime text makes a great combo here. Drag and drop file uploading and downloading. Amazingly, feels even more solid than the native Mac file explorer!
cons: Could be smarter at deleting or moving folders - as is, it does it by going through each file, which can be very slow, instead of using Linux commands such as rm, mv, etc. Eats up way too much RAM. An SFTP client shouldn't need 0.5-1GB

review_title: Cyberduck - Powerful and Free FTP
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Cyberduck is a full featured FTP software. Easily transfer large files or file structures with professional level oversight of the process. Access servers and webpages for managing your online properties. And its free!
cons: Some FTP programs have a slightly more graphical UI. Meaning some windows that appear like a finder window to navigate files. This one is more "old school" FTP, which I happen to prefer.

review_title: A Great File Transfer Client for the Tech Challenged
description: Cyberduck is my file transfer go-to. It gets the job done in the least amount of time and with the fewest number of problems.
author: Tim C.
pros: Cyber Duck is fast, reliable and easy to set up. It guides you through the process of making your connection, whether through standard FTP or secure socket. It provide ample feedback on progress and shows results clearly.
cons: I have found nothing negative. I've used Cyber Duck on Windows, OS X and Linux platforms with absolutely no problems.

review_title: Cyberduck much power for FREE
description: I have used Cyberduck primarily for looking after a hobby flight simulation website , but also in a role as a freelance software developer I have used the product to upload my work to client servers without any problems with permissions or client requirements. IT is a unique product for being free and I encourage any user to support them with a small donation as to keep the evolution of this product going. I would be lost without it now !!
author: Leslie J.
pros: The cost is free and they suggest a donation which is very noble of them for such a great product. It allows you to upload and download files using a variety of standard ftp protocols. The preferences allow you to resume large downloads by setting things like skipping files that match etc , which is very good for my voluntary work updating a whole website. You can also store bookmarks of the configurations you set up to connect to file servers thus making subsequent connections to the same server only a click away. While using the server side of things you can use Cyberduck as a file manager as it allows creating duplicate copies of files , creating new folders , deleting files and a simple way to set up permissions to files which is very important on many web-sites to help control access and security. Yes it is missing perhaps some features that you may get in other ftp programs but since it is free and feature rich it is more than likely to fit the needs of the majority of users
cons: I do not think there are any negative issues that one can associate to this product, I do get lost connections from time to time but that may be due to internet distance and speed, however with the preferences I can easily pick up where I left off when this happens.

review_title: One of the best file transfer software
author: Giuseppe N.
pros: I usually use for S3 Bucket transfer, has easy way manage drag and drop files over folders.
cons: a useful thing would be the ability to transfer files between buckets or ftp servers

review_title: A Simple Way to Move and Manage Files
description: We got Cyberduck around 10 years ago and used it for many many years to connect to an FTP server we used for hosting our podcast. It was simple to setup, easy to use and the cost was little to nothing.
author: Andrew H.
pros: I love the cost! At the time we got it, if I recall we got it for free or for very little, maybe close to 10 years ago. It is super easy to setup FTP servers and managing and moving your data is as easy as drag and drop.
cons: It’s not the most visually appealing FTP software but it’s just simple. For the purposes of how we used it, I never really had any complaints about it. It just functioned well.

review_title: Duck Duck Cyberduck
description: I use Cyberduck regularly to connect and upload documents and files to our numerous marketplaces. It's intuitive and easy to use. I've handed brief instructions to junior designers and they were able to connect and use Cyberduck with no trouble.
author: Robin M.
pros: I enjoy using Cyberduck while using BigCommerce to upload files and documents easily or our numerous marketplaces. It's intuitive and connects quickly and easily without any issues.
cons: There isn't anything I'd really say I like the least about Cyberduck. I've run into just a couple of minor issues with connecting to one of our marketplaces before but it was quickly resolved by disconnecting/reconnecting and rethinking it.

review_title: Top notch software for all my FTP needs
description: I really do love this software, even with the lack of a polished UI, it gets the job done.
author: Clint K.
pros: This software always made it easy to upload and manage files with any FTP server I needed. From school projects to professional applications, it always did the trick.
cons: It is not as user friendly than some other solutions. Because it is free and open source, UI is not as tight as other paid solutions. That being said, it has always done exactly what I need it to do.

review_title: Cyberduck is a fantastic SFTP client
description: The ability to have one app that can connect to multiple server type and cloud services helps increase productivity.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ability to be able to connect to ftp or sftp, or any of the popular cloud storage services makes Cyberduck one app that can control multiple services reducing the need for redundant apps.
cons: Nothing. There really isn't anything to dislike. The app is very simple in nature making it easy to learn.

review_title: Un service fiable et sécurisé
author: Julien B.
pros: L'outil est multiplateforme (fonctionne aussi bien sur Windows et Mac) et me parait très sécurisé
cons: Je n'aurai pas vraiment d'inconvénient à dire, le logiciel est très fiable.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Easy to use!
description: Great! There have been no issues or concerns for me with the software
author: Rosa G.
pros: I love how easy it is to use -- I've been able to quickly connect to our S3 bucket and easily make changes/view files
cons: Nothing really! I also love the duck logo - no complaints at all for the use cases I've tested, the software works very well.

review_title: Straight to the point
author: Maria C.
pros: The application is clean looking, and it is easy to learn how to use.
cons: The application can take its time uploading files, but mostly likely that has to do with one's Internet connection.

review_title: Easy to Use
author: Roslin O.
pros: Easy to use software and very helpful when it comes to setting up your own website and doing your own coding. No need to be a tech wise to use it.
cons: Not vary many cons. Just need to remember to follow the steps when updating your website or else it won’t make the changes and you’ll think it’s the software lol
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Cyberduck, una Papera Gialla al nostro servizio.
author: massimo V.
pros: La funzionalità principale è ovviamente quella di connettersi a siti remoti, questo viene eseguito egregiamente ed in maniera molto intuitiva. Ottima la funzione di salvataggio dei diversi servizi a cui abbiamo accesso. Interfaccia semplice ed intuitiva.
cons: Non ho trovato grossi difetti al programma, forse il fatto che spesso è richiesto un aggiornamento, ma in realtà non so se è da considerarsi una cosa negativa (è probabile sia legato alla necessità di aggiornare i protocolli).

review_title: Free and Straightforward
author: Catlin N.
pros: The interface is simple and straightforward, which I think is beneficial for something like an FTP client that many people have not used.. it makes utilizing the program easy.
cons: Login cannot be fully automated, but that may be common to all FTP clients

review_title: Should be installed on every machine by default.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Price - It's free and feature rich. Everyone should have Cyberduck installed, even if it's not your primary FTP client. The UI is easy to use and gets the job done without fuss. Cyberduck is reliable and connections stay solid. Speaking of connections - ever find even when credentials are 100% correct, your FTP client refuses to connect to the server (I'm looking at you Filezilla)? Not once have I had this problem with Cyberduck!
cons: There is nothing I dislike about Cyberduck. It has saved us in so many binds and is a must install on any machine.

review_title: Makes it easy to move files between environments
description: I spend a lot of time moving data between systems, particularly from my desktop to servers and Cyberduck makes this simple, easy and fast.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Cyberduck makes it so simple to move files between systems. There are so many options available and it handles most things automatically, particularly automatic compression, which is awesome.
cons: There really isn't anything I dislike about Cyberduck, it just works and does the job that it was designed for.

review_title: Best FTP software for OS X
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to install just Swiss Army Knife for everyday FTP :)
cons: its impossible to not like the Cyberduck - just look at that cute icon ;)

review_title: Exceptional Software for CDN
description: Perfect for large files that you need to create CDN links for.
author: Natalie D.
pros: I like that you can drop in any media file and cyberduck will turn it right in to a CDN link that you can copy and paste in to the back end of website. It is the home to all of our large files that we need to turn in to CDN links.
cons: Cyberduck can take awhile to upload a file on to its dashboard. And you have to periodically clear the queue after it prompts you. The storage space is pretty impressive, but it can be hard to file the files unless you have someone monitoring the software and people using titling systems correctly.

review_title: Trusty friend when no other SFTP agrees with the server.
description: Love it! It's easy, gets the job done and I have never had trouble connecting with it.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use, quick and reliable. Cyberduck has not failed me over the 10+ years I have used it.
cons: Managing connections is a bit backwards. No other cons.

review_title: Cyberduck Review
author: Gabrielle O.
pros: I like cyberduck in order to house a large amount of large files. Cyberduck allows us to turn all of those large files in to CDN links that can be entered to the back end of our website. These cdn links can be podcast files, audiobook files, and pdf files. It is a great tool to turn any of those files types in to a link that can be added to any website. You can also send the cyberduck-created cdn links via email!
cons: Once you put many files in to cyberduck, if you do not have someone monitoring and creating a nomenclature system it can be difficult to go back and find what you may be looking for. I would suggest creating many tabs and keeping a nomenclature system consistent throughout your usage of cyberduck or you will not be able to go back and find a file.
